title: Krea 2 推出生成式滑块控制图像属性
full_text:
Krea on X: "introducing Generative Sliders.
now you can control the intensity, complexity, and movement of any image you generate with Krea 2.
what new controls would you like to see? 👇 https://t.co/6fhBB2WLu8" / X

what new controls would you like to see? 👇
